subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Divine One, what can I pen when in this solitary corner, O my solace and companion, mine eyes are filled with tears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده دیرین یزدانی چه نویسم که در این گوشه تنهاای مونس و انیسم چشم اشکبار و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for unity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
